data.name: TP0000
data.value: Cannot implicitly convert type {0} to {1}. Use a cast operator.

data.name: TP0001
data.value: The operation {0} {1} {2} is invalid. Check both operand types.

data.name: TP0002
data.value: The {0} type can only be applied to bool operands.

data.name: TP0003
data.value: The bool type cannot perform shift operations.

data.name: TP0004
data.value: The null type cannot be used in an operation with {0}.
